title: Fabolouwus Vanilla
description:
Fabolouwus Vanilla is a little Modpack filled with Performance, Utility and Visual mods, that even a potato can run!
Made with 💜 by LyzCoote
body:
**Fabolouwus Vanilla**

Fabolouwus Vanilla is a meticulously crafted Minecraft modpack that aims to elevate your vanilla experience. 

This modpack seamlessly integrates **_performance-boosting mods_** and **_Quality of Life improvements_** to create a smoother, more enjoyable gameplay experience. 

Expect **_enhanced graphics_**, **_optimized frame rates_**, and **_intuitive interfaces_** that make everyday tasks easier. 

With Fabolouwus Vanilla, you get the best of both worlds: the classic feel of vanilla Minecraft combined with modern enhancements that make your adventures even more delightful. 

Perfect for players who love the original game but crave a more refined and responsive experience. 

Dive into a world where vanilla meets fabulous, or should we say, _**Fabolouwus**_ (Fabulous + uwu)!


<details>

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

This pack was inspired by the modpack [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop).

<details>
<summary>Updates</summary>

Currently, we support Minecraft version 1.21. As soon as the mods we depend on are updated, we will update the pack accordingly.


</details>
